name: Legendary Demolition Maul
description: Can we break it? Yes we can!
dropLocation: This Old Haunt, end chest, Wraith chest

name: Legendary Destructive Hooked Blade
description:
This vicious, curved sword, capable of slicing straight through enemy limbs,
can now weaken the defenses of the wielder's foes.
dropLocation: Cauldron of Sora Katra, upgraded version of Legendary Hooked Blade

name: Legendary Destructive Shadow Staff
description:
This withered staff, said to be infused with the Shadow's arcane power, can
now weaken the defenses of the wielder's foes.
dropLocation: Cauldron of Sora Katra, upgraded version of Legendary Staff of the Shadow

name: Legendary Destructive War Axe
description:
This war axe, infused with the fury of the Droaam ogre brutes, can now weaken
the defenses of the wielder's foes.
dropLocation: Cauldron of Sora Katra, upgraded version of Legendary Ogrish War Axe

name: Legendary Destructive War Bow
description: This powerful gnoll bow can now weaken the defenses of the wielder's foes.
dropLocation: Cauldron of Sora Katra, upgraded version of Legendary Gnollish War Bow

name: Legendary Doublecross Bow
description:
The drow of Faerun's Underdark favor small handcrossbows that can be used quickly,
silently, and with poisoned ammunition. The bolts fired from this light repeating
weapon will inject a struck target with a venom that may put it to sleep instantly.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Doublecross Bow

name: Legendary Drowhunter
description:
This impressive war axe was forged to target the Drow, striking down all who
did not flee from its fearsome wielder.
dropLocation: Records of the Past, End Chest

name: Legendary Drysvayla's Axe
description:
A fragment of the great Green Dragon's power made manifest, a sad reminder of
a day where reason failed.
dropLocation: Going Rogue, end chest

name: Legendary Drysvayla's Razor
description:
A fragment of the great Green Dragon's power made manifest, a sad reminder of
a day where reason failed.
dropLocation: Going Rogue, end chest

name: Legendary Duelist's Epee
description: This Rapier is ideal for any who fancy themselves a duelist.
dropLocation: The Haunting of Saltmarsh, end chest, or Legendary version of Epic Duelist's Epee

name: Legendary Dwarven Brawler's Wraps
description:
Legend has it that when a great Dwarven hero had his axe shattered by the Drow,
he took a swig from his flask, tore his tunic, wrapped the shreds around his
hands, and routed them with nothing but devastating punches.
dropLocation: Desire in the Dark, End chest

name: Legendary Dwarven Waraxe of the Fallen Age
description: Wild magic has imbued entropy into this weapon over the years.
dropLocation: Magic of Myth Drannor, any end chest
_file: Legendary Dwarven Waraxe of the Fallen Age.item

name: Legendary Dwarven Waraxe of the Golden Age
description: Forged in the glory of Cormanthor, this weapon is remarkably well-preserved.
dropLocation: Magic of Myth Drannor, rare drop in any end chest
_file: Legendary Dwarven Waraxe of the Golden Age.item

name: Legendary Dynastic Falcata
description:
A fine falcata forged for the sons of kings. It is said that it takes more than
strength to lead a kingdom.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Dynastic Falcata

name: Legendary Echo of Blackrazor
description:
It delights in your voracity.

There is something missing from this legendary sword... something that makes
it feel... incomplete.
dropLocation: White Plume Mountain, End chest

name: Legendary Echo of the Artblade
description:
An echo of the legendary elven longsword Artblade. This echo broke off of the
Artblade's mind in defiance of the Blade-rite's draconian tendencies, and is
open to being wielded by anyone.
dropLocation: Portal to Below, end chest (rare)

name: Legendary Echo of the Crownblade
description:
An echo of the legendary elven longsword Ruler's Blade, also known as the Crownblade.
This echo broke off of the Crownblade's mind in defiance of the Blade-rite's
draconian tendencies, and is open to being wielded by anyone.
dropLocation: The Zulkir's Plan, end chest (rare)

name: Legendary Echo of the Warblade
description:
An echo of the legendary elven longsword Warblade. This echo broke off of the
Warblade's mind in defiance of the Blade-rite's draconian tendencies, and is
open to being wielded by anyone.
dropLocation: The Key to the Mythal, end chest (rare)

name: Legendary Echo of Wave
description:
The crash of the waves echoes in your ears. Seize the moment, and swim for the surface.

There is something missing from this legendary weapon... something that makes
it feel... incomplete.
dropLocation: White Plume Mountain, End chest

name: Legendary Echo of Whelm
description:
Steely strikes and brewing storms

There is something missing from this legendary weapon... something that makes
it feel... incomplete.
dropLocation: White Plume Mountain, End chest

name: Legendary Elyd Edge
description:
Elven script on this fine silver blade reads 'Anthem of the heart; Anthem of
the mind'.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Elyd Edge

name: Legendary Envenomed Blade
description:
A small blade wielded by the drow assassins of Faerun's Underdark, steeped in
a powerful poison that causes persistent damage to its targets. It is also
a thin and sharp enough weapon to bypass the defenses of many targets and deliver
critical blows.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Envenomed Blade

name: Legendary Falchion of the Fallen Age
description: Wild magic has imbued entropy into this weapon over the years.
dropLocation: Magic of Myth Drannor, any end chest

dropLocation: Magic of Myth Drannor, rare drop in any end chest

name: Legendary Fangs of the Wild Hunt
description:
Guard dogs have been used throughout Barovia over the years, grim reminders
that none are welcome. Bug: Likely to be changed in the future, because it
is a raw copy-n-paste from Hound of the Night by the devs.
dropLocation: The Feywild, rare encounters

interfered with the forging process. It seems to have enhanced the weapon's
with a subtle magic, making it equivalent to Flametouched Iron, at the cost
of some of the steel's natural durability.

description:
A small implement that has been imbued with magic to shield the wielder from

previous owner, but at least it also makes the wielder glowingly confident.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Flameward

description: The Shining Crescent will reflect all else.
dropLocation: Blown Deadline, End chest

name: Legendary Flint
description: A stone dagger crackling with magical energies.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Flint

name: Legendary Flotsam (level 32)
description:
This driftwood shard has saved a few lives by being hard to detect as a weapon.
It seems to be effective against the undead.
dropLocation: Treasure of Crystal Cove, Turn in 1500 Silver Doubloon 700 Golden Doubloon 45 Stolen Jasper 1000 Green Dragonshard at Euphonia's Barter Box

name: Legendary Forge
description:
In years long passed, Dwarf blacksmiths used hammers such as this to forge the
very blades that are still wielded against the Drow.
dropLocation: Strike Back, End chest

name: Legendary Forgotten Axe
description:
This small stone axe looks like it was forgotten for a long time. If you had
to estimate, eleven years or so. That's a long time to forget about a Hand
Axe.
dropLocation: Black and Blue, end chest

Gnoll archers are sought throughout Droaam for their skilled marksmanship. This

to the launch of its arrows, is equally sought-after.
dropLocation: Attack on Stormreach, End reward

name: Legendary Greatclub of the Scrag
description:
This particularly nasty weapon once belonged to one of the Scrag in High Priestess'
Slikir's service. It seems that when the troll was killed, its blood seeped
into this club, granting the weapon some of the creature's characteristics.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Greatclub of the Scrag

name: Legendary Green Blade
description:
A simple knife with a curved green tinged blade and a handle of polished densewood.
Holding the dagger, you feel a rush of arcane power. This is no mere dagger.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Green Blade

name: Legendary Green Steel Bastard Sword
description:
Also known as a hand-and-a-half sword, and the largest of the single-handed
swords, this weapon requires special trainiing to use.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Battle Axe
description: A sturdy, broad-headed axe used as a weapon especially among dwarves.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Dagger
description: A short simple weapon with a pointed blade used for stabbing.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Dart
description:
A small weapon the size of an arrow, with a weighted head. You're quite surprised
that the devils of Shavarath would bother having a recipe for darts.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Dwarven Waraxe
description:
This axe is too large to be used in one hand without the special training that
all dwarven warriors receive.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Falchion
description:
This large, curved sword is essentially a scimitar designed to be used with
two hands.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Great Crossbow
description:
The largest of the crossbows, it is weighty enough to require special training
to use.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Greataxe
description: A big, heavy, double-bladed axe wieldable only with two hands.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Greatclub
description:
A more formidable version of a simple club, this two-handed weapon is occasionally
reinforced with spikes or bands of iron.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Greatsword
description: The largest of the swords, this weapon can only be used with two hands.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Hand Axe
description: A smaller version of the Battleaxe, favored as an offhand weapon by dwarves.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Handwraps
description:
Strips of cloth meant to be wrapped around your hands. They have small pieces
of foreign metal woven throughout.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Heavy Crossbow
description:
A ranged weapon consisting of a small bow mounted crosswise on a heavy wooden
stock. This weapon is large enough to require a winch for reloading, yet is
surprisingly simple to use.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Heavy Mace
description: A simple weapon comprised of a solid blunt head attached to a haft
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Heavy Pick
description:
A hammer with a sharp, pointed head designed to concentrate the force of its
blow on a small area. Similar to a miner's pick, but reinforced for battle.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Kama
description:
A weapon with a straight inside edge attached perpendicularly to a thin wooden
haft and wielded with one hand.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Khopesh
description: An ancient sword with a heavy spine and a single blade.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Kukri
description: A heavy, curved knife with a sharp edge on the inside of the curve.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Light Crossbow
description:
A simple ranged weapon consisting of a small bow mounted crosswise on a light
wooden stock.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Light Hammer
description: A small sledge with a blunt, square head.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Light Mace
description: A smaller simple weapon comprised of a solid blunt head attached to a haft.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Light Pick
description:
A small hammer with a sharp, pointed head designed to concentrate the force
of its blow on a small area. Similar to a miner's pick, but smaller and reinforced
for battle.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Longbow
description:
A large, curved wooden bow, often nearly as tall as a human. This weapon is
popular among elves and rangers.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Longsword
description:
A classic straight-bladed sword usable in one hand. This weapon is commonly
associated with knighthood and valor.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Maul
description:
The largest of the hammers, often created with a wedge-shaped head for splitting
logs.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Morningstar
description: A simple weapon comprised of a round, spiked head and a long haft.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Quarterstaff
description:
A long, stout staff used as a simple weapon. Often favored by wizards or common
folk.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Rapier
description:
A long, thin sword with a fine point. Unlike other swords, this weapon lacks
an edged blade, and can only be used for thrusting attacks.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Repeating Heavy Crossbow
description:
A complex weapon consisting of a heavy crossbow and a clip for bolts that is
loaded by pulling the lever.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes
_file: Legendary Green Steel Repeating Heavy Crossbow.item

name: Legendary Green Steel Repeating Light Crossbow
description:
A complex weapon consisting of a light crossbow and a clip for bolts that is
loaded by pulling the reloading lever.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes
_file: Legendary Green Steel Repeating Light Crossbow.item

name: Legendary Green Steel Sceptre
description: A simple wooden weapon with a wide, round head and a narrow haft.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Scimitar
description:
A curved sword favored by the elves of Valenar. The unique shape gives this
weapon a keener edge.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Shortbow
description: A smaller wooden bow with a shorter firing distance.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Shortsword
description:
The smallest of the swords, light enough to be used as an offhand weapon but
too large to be considered a dagger.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Shuriken
description:
A tiny circular throwing weapon with a serrated edge. Favored by the plentiful
ninjas of Shavarath.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Sickle
description:
A simple weapon with a semicircular blade attached to a short handle. Typically
used by farmers for cutting grain.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Throwing Axe
description: A small, light axe designed for throwing.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Throwing Dagger
description: A short simple weapon with a pointed blade balanced for throwing.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Throwing Hammer
description: A small, light hammer designed for throwing
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Green Steel Warhammer
description:
A large sledge with a heavy, square head. Popular among dwarves as an alternative
to the axe.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

description:
This crossbow has much in common with an orthon warrior's ranged weaponry. It
invests the ammunition it launches with powerful, fiery energy.
dropLocation: The Chronoscope (Legendary), end chest, or Legendary version of Epic Hellfire Crossbow

description:
A fearsome polearm that resembles the cruel implements orthon warriors use to

much like an orthon.
dropLocation: The Chronoscope (Legendary), end chest, or Legendary version of Epic Hellstroke Great Axe

Guard dogs have been used throughout Barovia over the years, grim reminders

name: Legendary Hull-Melter's Mace (level 32)
description:

name: Legendary Hull-Wrecker's Hammer (level 32)

name: Legendary Luminous Truth
description:
This tool was crafted for divine priests of the Silver Flame, as well as those
who would wield a quarterstaff as a weapon in the Silver Flame's name. It deals
fire and light damage to its targets and enhances the power of magical light
and flames.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Luminous Truth

description: This brilliant Khopesh can cut through even the toughest of foes in an instant.
dropLocation: Roll Call, End Chest

description: This quarterstaff is fused from two separate sceptres.

name: Legendary Maiming Cleaver
description:
This falchion, infused with the power to draw a living enemy's blood, can now
deal extra damage on critical hits as it maims enemies.
dropLocation: Cauldron of Sora Katra, upgraded version of Legendary Bloody Cleaver

name: Legendary Maiming Fury Blade
description:
This large sword, capable of conferring a disease to enemies, can now deal extra
damage on critical hits as it maims enemies.
dropLocation: Cauldron of Sora Katra, upgraded version of Legendary Blade of Fury

name: Legendary Maiming Fury Shortsword
description:
This small sword, capable of conferring a disease to enemies, can now deal extra
damage on critical hits as it maims enemies.
dropLocation: Cauldron of Sora Katra, upgraded version of Legendary Blade of Fury (produces a pair of swords)

name: Legendary Maiming Rocksplitter
description:
This pick, said to be infused with the Shadow's arcane power, can now deal extra
damage on critical hits as it maims enemies.
dropLocation: Cauldron of Sora Katra, upgraded version of Legendary Rocksplitter

name: Legendary Maiming Stonedust Wraps
description:
These strips of cloth, capable of turning enemies to stone, can now deal extra
damage on critical hits as they maim enemies.
dropLocation: Cauldron of Sora Katra, upgraded version of Legendary Stonedust Handwraps

description: This magical sceptre is attuned to Positive spells.
dropLocation: An Element of Chaos, End chest

description: This magical sceptre is attuned to Negative Energy and Poison spells.

name: Legendary Master Transmuter's Staff
description:
This magnificent staff was very likely a relic created by Mordain the Fleshweaver.
It was probably shattered at some point long ago, with its two halves being
scattered across Droaam until they were reforged into a single weapon again.
dropLocation: Cauldron of Sora Katra, upgraded from Legendary Scepter of the Fleshweaver + Legendary Scepter of the Ogre Magi + Legendary Mark of Tzaryan Rrac

name: Legendary Masthead
description:
This Great Crossbow was fashioned out of the ropes, sails and pulleys from a
crashed and sunken ship.
dropLocation: All Hail the King, end chest

when wielded by a combatant with a sharp mind. Monks may use this weapon without
becoming uncentered.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Midnight Greetings

name: Legendary Naildriver
description: When all you have is a nail, everything looks like a hammer.
dropLocation: The Isle of Dread, any end chest

name: Legendary Nightbringer's Wake
description: Pain and suffering follow this blade.
dropLocation: Rats in a Cage, end chest (rare)

name: Legendary Nightshade Shooter
description:
Fires bolts that have been prepared with an incredibly powerful poison. Handle
with care.
dropLocation: The Same Old Song, End Chest

name: Legendary Noxious Fang
description:
One of the dread spider Mandible's poisonous fangs was transformed into a throwing
knife. It deals poison damage and is enchanted to always return to the thrower.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Noxious Fang

name: Legendary Ogrish War Axe
description:
The ogres of Droaam dress themselves in heavy armor and wield huge metallic
weapons, unlike their more tribal cousins. This war axe is infused with the
fury of such well-armed ogre brutes.
dropLocation: Attack on Stormreach, End reward

name: Legendary Ol' Reliable
description:
This hefty wooden hammer is everything you need to repair and maintain a seaworthy
vessel.
dropLocation: The Curse and the Captive Crustacean, end chest

name: Legendary Ornamented Dagger (level 32)
description:
A dagger set with precious gems, each of which are enchanted with spell-enhancing
magic. Most likely it was seized from nobles by a band of pirates as part of
their pillaging.
dropLocation: Treasure of Crystal Cove, Turn in 1500 Silver Doubloon 700 Golden Doubloon 45 Stolen Jasper 1000 Green Dragonshard at Euphonia's Barter Box

name: Legendary Petrifying Hooked Blade
description:
This vicious, curved sword, capable of slicing straight through enemy limbs,
can now cause its wielder's foes to turn solidly to stone.
dropLocation: Cauldron of Sora Katra, upgraded version of Legendary Hooked Blade

name: Legendary Petrifying Shadow Staff
description:
This withered staff, said to be infused with the Shadow's arcane power, can
now cause its wielder's foes to turn solidly to stone.
dropLocation: Cauldron of Sora Katra, upgraded version of Legendary Staff of the Shadow

name: Legendary Petrifying War Axe
description:
This war axe, infused with the fury of the Droaam ogre brutes, can now cause
its wielder's foes to turn solidly to stone.
dropLocation: Cauldron of Sora Katra, upgraded version of Legendary Ogrish War Axe

name: Legendary Petrifying War Bow
description:
This powerful gnoll bow can now grant life to its wielder as it draws blood
from his or her foes.
dropLocation: Cauldron of Sora Katra, upgraded version of Legendary Gnollish War Bow

name: Legendary Phiarlan Spy Dagger
description:
House Phiarlan assassins and spies carry daggers like this when they need to
carry out a mission efficiently and from the shadows. This particular blade
drips acid when drawn and can lure foes into letting down their guard.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Phiarlan Spy Dagger

name: Legendary Planar Spike
description: Something very wrong lies somewhere deep within.
dropLocation: Toxic Treatment, End chest

name: Legendary Platinum Knuckles
description: Dust these knuckles, punk.

description: The wicked point of this dagger leaves wounds that don't heal like they should.
dropLocation: The Knife's Edge, end chest (rare)

task and would probably be useful in battle as well.
dropLocation: Treasure of Crystal Cove, Turn in 1500 Silver Doubloon 700 Golden Doubloon 45 Stolen Jasper 1000 Green Dragonshard at Euphonia's Barter Box

name: Legendary Rocksplitter
description:
Diggers in the Droaam Army who were attempting to tunnel beneath Stormreach
and gain the element of surprise used picks like this to aid them.
dropLocation: Eyes of Stone, End chest

name: Legendary Rope and Pulley
description:
An old sailor's creed, "A ship's only as good as its weakest link," applies
doubly so in a storm.
dropLocation: Whispers of Return, end chest

name: Legendary Rumbling Thunder
description: This crossbow is... vibrating?
dropLocation: Security Detail, End chest

name: Legendary Savaran's Tooth
description:
A fragment of the Blue Dragon's power that came into being when his soul was
torn from his body.
dropLocation: Thrall of Duty, end chest

name: Legendary Scalegouger
description: This Heavy Pick is a quick and efficient way to pry scales from large fish.
dropLocation: Danger at Dunwater, end chest, or Legendary version of Epic Scalegouger

name: Legendary Scepter of the Fleshweaver
description:
Said to be a creation of Mordain the Fleshweaver, master transmuter of Droaam,
this scepter boosts the wielder's intellect and improves his or her skill with
transmutation magic.
dropLocation: Frame Work, End chests, Dorris ' chests

name: Legendary Scepter of the Ogre Magi
description:
Lost to time, this scepter was eventually recovered by ogre magi and put to
use in combat. It improves the damage of one's spells and makes him or her
less likely to be interrupted while casting them.
dropLocation: Assault on Summerfield, end chest

name: Legendary Shipbreaker
description:

enchantments are excellent against sturdy constructs.

name: Legendary Sickle of Vile Attunement
description: This evil implement is well suited to any Necromancer.
dropLocation: The Sacred Bounty, End chest

name: Legendary Silver Blade of the Flame
description: This Silver weapons seems to call to you...
dropLocation: Housekeeping, End chest
_file: Legendary Silver Blade of the Flame.item

name: Legendary Silver Slinger
description:
When Templars of the Silver Flame requested a powerful crossbow for use against
the undead, the Silver Slinger was the answer. It blunts the ammunition used
with it such that even skeletons will crumble beneath its assault.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Silver Slinger

name: Legendary Sinister Handaxe
description:
Something about this axe makes you uneasy. On the other hand, it fits so snugly
into your off-hand.
dropLocation: Ravens' Bane, end chest

name: Legendary Sirocco
description:
A desert spirit bound to this sword summons a tiny sandstorm around its target
on each hit. This sandstorm can blind and even knock down your opponent.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Sirocco

name: Legendary Skeleton Hunter
description: This Maul seeks to crumble all bones laid before it.
dropLocation: Dread Sea Scrolls, end chest

name: Legendary Slave Master's Staff
description:
This staff contains the power of Fire, the wrath of Electricity, and the corruption
of Acid.
dropLocation: Assault on the Aerie of the Slave Lords, End chest

name: Legendary Souleater
description:
This is the staff used by the sahuagin High Priestess Slikir to commune with
and channel a demon. It took on many of the demon's aspects and is now a dangerous
and corrupted implement.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Souleater

name: Legendary Spearfisher
description:
This fishing spear makes for a fine weapon - or, in a pinch, a quick way to
secure some lunch.
dropLocation: Wild Thing, end chest

name: Legendary Spectre Striker
description:
A subtle mist surrounds this weapon. It is likely quite useful against certain
Undead foes that other weapons have a hard time connecting with.
dropLocation: Housekeeping, Either End chest

name: Legendary Splintermast
description: This broken shard of a wrecked ship seeks out enemies to take its revenge.
dropLocation: Under the Cover of Darkness, end chest, or Legendary version of Epic Splintermast

name: Legendary Staff of Arcane Power
description:
This staff began as a ceremonial weapon created by the gnolls of the desert.
Long years of use by powerful shaman have gradually increased the staff's power.
This process has accelerated lately as the staff has been involved in powerful
summoning ritual.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Staff of Arcane Power

name: Legendary Staff of Inner Sight
description:
This staff is made from a slender willow branch. As you hold it, you feel the
weight and knowledge of many centuries wash over your senses.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Staff of Inner Sight

name: Legendary Staff of Nat Gann
description:
This weapon once belonged to the famed performer Nat Gann. Though he remains
lost to time, his staff lives on in his memory, and is an ideal tool for the
aspiring acrobat.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Staff of Nat Gann

name: Legendary Staff of the Shadow
description:
The Shadow, worshipped throughout Droaam for his inclination towards destruction,
is said to have invested this withered staff with some of his arcane power.
dropLocation: Attack on Stormreach, End reward

name: Legendary Sting
description:
A gigantic scorpion stinger has been filed down and enchanted to form the blade
of this short sword.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Sting

name: Legendary Stonedust Handwraps
description:
These strips of cloth seem to be always covered in dust and fine bits of rock.
When striking enemies they will occasionally stun them or turn them to stone,
and when wielded by a Monk in Earth Stance they will sometimes protect the
wearer with stone as well.
dropLocation: Eyes of Stone, End chest

name: Legendary Stonework Beam
description:
Lighter that one would expect, this beam retains all of the toughness of Dwarwen
stonework.
dropLocation: Graveyard Shift, End chest

name: Legendary Storm
description:
This gnoll-built weapon is crude but carries an aura of magic. Its bolts fly
through the air with great power and accuracy.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Storm

name: Legendary Stormreach Guardian's Axe
description:
Left behind by a fallen member of the Stormreach Harbor Guard, this axe's work
is not yet finished.
dropLocation: Night Falls on Stormreach, End Chest

name: Legendary Stormreach Guardian's Crossbow
description:
Left behind by a fallen member of the Stormreach Harbor Guard, this crossbow's
aim is still true.
dropLocation: Night Falls on Stormreach, End chest

name: Legendary Stormreach Guardian's Hammer
description:
Left behind by a fallen member of the Stormreach Harbor Guard, this hammer still
has strikes left in it.
dropLocation: Quarantine, End Chest

name: Legendary Suncrusher
description: "The sun itself will strike you down!"
dropLocation: Smash and Burn, end chest

name: Legendary Sunken Blasphemy
description:
Commissioned as thanks for a daring rescue by a prodigal monk, these matching
blades were lost at sea decades ago. The inscription on the blade reads 'a
small repayment' in flowing Elven script. Whoever this 'Arkat' was, he must
have done something very heroic.
dropLocation: Lost at Sea, Gift of the Devourer optional chest

description:
A sanctified axe that shines brightly with the power of the Silver Flame. It
is said to deliver the wrath of Tira Miron again and again upon those that
it strikes.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Templar's Justice

description:
A sanctified blade that shines brightly with the power of the Silver Flame.
It is said to deliver the wrath of Tira Miron again and again upon those that
it strikes.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Templar's Retribution

name: Legendary The Dragon Dagger
description:
When wind rushes through holes in this green dagger's hilt, it calls the mighty
dragons home.
dropLocation: Going Rogue, end chest

name: Legendary The Renovator
description: That wall was just holding you back.
dropLocation: This Old Haunt, end chest, Wraith chest

name: Legendary Thirteen
description: The thirteenth sword of the thirteenth plane.
dropLocation: The Hand and the Eyes, end chest

name: Legendary Thornlord

make this bow exceptionally easy to pull and fire resulting in an additional
+4 damage.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Thornlord

"Storm the Beaches!"

"Wait, literally?"

name: Legendary Thunderstrike
description:
This rapier subverts enemy defenses using the jolts of electricity infused within
its slender blade.
dropLocation: Third Time's a Charm, End Chest

name: Legendary Timeblade
description:
A sword gifted with the power to bend time. Powerful blows against your enemies
will slow their actions, and if you are falling and in danger it will slow
your descent so that you land safely.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Timeblade

name: Legendary Tinder
description:
This long staff is imbued with the burning power of the desert sun. Fire spells
cast using this staff to focus them are much more powerful.

name: Legendary Twinchopper
description: A greataxe worthy of your good name.

name: Mirana of the Flame
description:
FEYTWISTED form of Valorius, the Flameblade 

A blazing beam of red hot fire that sprang forth from your hands... Although
it's not quite clear what has conjured it. The flames respond to the willpower
and intuition of the wielder. As the Flame Blade is not physical, monks may
use it without becoming uncentered.

this lute, swinging it about wildly. One pirate started referring to it as
'Moonhowl's Axe', and the name stuck.
dropLocation: Three-Barrel Cove (heroic), Hafgrim Moonhowler 's Chest (Rare Encounter)

name: Morningstar of the Fallen Age
description: Wild magic has imbued entropy into this weapon over the years.
dropLocation: Magic of Myth Drannor, any end chest

name: Morningstar of the Golden Age
description: Forged in the glory of Cormanthor, this weapon is remarkably well-preserved.
dropLocation: Magic of Myth Drannor, rare drop in any end chest

name: Morningstar of the Heretic
description:
This morningstar was wielded by a once-great Cardinal of the Silver Flame, who
was disgraced after his dealings with the Lords of Dust were exposed.
dropLocation: The Crypt of Gerard Dryden, End chest

name: Morningstar of the Undying Age
description: The ritual's power has imbued this weapon with an immortal fire and unholy purpose.
dropLocation:
Ritual Table, Turn in 
Legendary Morningstar of the Golden Age 
120 Barrier Fragments

name: Muck's Devastation
description: Muck II: The Revenge
dropLocation: Kind of a Big Deal, End chest

name: Muck's Doom
description:
Glossy black and perfectly balanced, this weapon bears magic runes devoted to
the eradication of slimes. It is impervious to their acid. A very useful tool
for exploring the sewers of Stormreach.
dropLocation: The Pit, Avatar of Juiblex 's Chest

name: Muck's Obliteration
description: Muck the Third: The Revenge II
dropLocation: Kind of a Big Deal, End chest

name: Muckbane
description: A club made out of some unknown but highly polished black substance.
dropLocation: Durk's Got A Secret, Muck 's chest

name: Mutineer's Blade
description:
Throwing the captain overboard was the easy part. It was fending off her ghost,
month after month, that harried the mutinous crew.
dropLocation: Old Tomb, New Tenants, End Chest; Three-Barrel Cove (epic), All Rare Encounters

name: Mutiny's Tooth
description: This magical dagger, a trophy of battle, is magically enhanced.
dropLocation: Irestone Inlet, Mutiny 's Chest

name: Mystic Force
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Mythic Bone Crusher
description:
Infused with a magic which attunes itself to the wielder, the polished stone
staff anticipates movement allowing the heavy weapon to swing effortlessly
through the air.
dropLocation: Palace of Stone, End chest

name: Naildriver
description: When all you have is a nail, everything looks like a hammer.
dropLocation: Isle of Dread (wilderness), rare encounter chest (observed in Green Dragon chest)

name: Nature's Vengeance
description:
Surely the tool of a Gatekeeper druid for driving back extraplanar horrors,
this wooden staff is a potent weapon against such terrible foes. The fate of
the item's original owner, as well as the exact age of the staff, remain unknown.
dropLocation: Reign of Madness, End reward

name: Necrotic Forum Post (level 10)
description:
This post, once part of a fence around an old speaking forum in Stormreach,
is positively ancient. Better left alone.
dropLocation: Anniversary Party, Turn in 20

name: Necrotic Forum Post (level 15)
description:
This post, once part of a fence around an old speaking forum in Stormreach,
is positively ancient. Better left alone.
dropLocation: Anniversary Party, Turn in 40

name: Necrotic Forum Post (level 20)
description:
This post, once part of a fence around an old speaking forum in Stormreach,
is positively ancient. Better left alone.
dropLocation: Anniversary Party, Turn in 60

description:
This post, once part of a fence around an old speaking forum in Stormreach,
is positively ancient. Better left alone.
dropLocation: Anniversary Party, Turn in 80

name: Necrotic Forum Post (level 30)
description:
This post, once part of a fence around an old speaking forum in Stormreach,
is positively ancient. Better left alone.
dropLocation: Anniversary Party, Turn in 100

name: Necrotic Forum Post (level 5)
description:
This post, once part of a fence around an old speaking forum in Stormreach,
is positively ancient. Better left alone.
dropLocation: Anniversary Party, Turn in 10

name: Needle, Quill-slinger
description:
This repeating crossbow has an enchanted bolt-feeding mechanism, increasing
the rate at which it can fire, while maintaining precise accuracy.
dropLocation: Caught in the Web, End chest

name: Nicked Greatsword
description:
The largest of the swords, this weapon can only be used with two hands. The
cross guard of this sword appears to have some engraving that was filed off.
dropLocation: The Sharn Syndicate, End reward

name: Nicked Heavy Mace
description:
A simple weapon comprised of a solid blunt head attached to a haft. A religious
symbol appears to have been defaced on the head of the weapon.
dropLocation: The Sharn Syndicate, End reward

name: Nicked Kama
description:
A weapon with a straight inside edge attached perpendicularly to a thin wooden
haft and wielded with one hand. The wooden haft appears to have been sanded
down to remove a series of marks that would have made this item identifiable.
dropLocation: The Sharn Syndicate, End reward

name: Nicked Light Hammer
description: A small sledge with a blunt, square head.
dropLocation: The Sharn Syndicate, End reward

name: Nicked Longbow
description:
A large, curved wooden bow, often nearly as tall as a human. This weapon is
popular among elves and rangers. The bow appears to have once been carved with
a name that appears to have been made illegible by a chisel.
dropLocation: The Sharn Syndicate, End reward

name: Nicked Longsword
description:
A classic straight-bladed sword usable in one hand. This weapon is commonly
associated with knighthood and valor. The pommel appears to have had a symbol
that has been battered with a hammer.
dropLocation: The Sharn Syndicate, End reward

name: Nicked Quarterstaff
description:
A long, stout staff used as a simple weapon. Often favored by wizards or common
folk.
dropLocation: The Sharn Syndicate, End reward

name: Nicked Repeating Light Crossbow
description:
A complex weapon consisting of a light crossbow and a clip for bolts that is
loaded by pulling the reloading lever.
dropLocation: The Sharn Syndicate, End reward

name: Nicked Scimitar
description:
A curved sword favored by the elves of Valenar. The unique shape gives this
weapon a keener edge. An inscription on the hilt reads 'To my dearest...'.
The rest of the wording appears to have been melted off the hilt.
dropLocation: The Sharn Syndicate, End reward

name: Nicked Shortsword
description:
The smallest of the swords, light enough to be used as an offhand weapon but
too large to be considered a dagger. This appears to have an emblem that has
been sanded off the hilt.
dropLocation: The Sharn Syndicate, End reward

name: Nightblade
description:
This large, curved sword is essentially a scimitar designed to be used with
two hands.
dropLocation: Tempest's Spine, Zerisenz Chest

name: Nightbringer's Wake
description: Pain and suffering follow this blade.
dropLocation: Rats in a Cage, end chest (rare)

name: Nightforge Avenger Blade
description:
A mighty longsword forged from adamantine, designed to be carried by the heavily-armored
Duergar legions.
dropLocation: A Relic of a Sovereign Past, Turn in 10 Adamantine Ore

name: Nightforge Gouge
description:
Forged from pure adamantine, this mining pick can pierce solid stone, forged
steel or beast hide with ease.
dropLocation: A Relic of a Sovereign Past, Turn in 10 Adamantine Ore

name: Nightforge Hammer
description: To forge weapons of adamantine, a hammer of similar quality must be used.
dropLocation: A Relic of a Sovereign Past, Turn in 10 Adamantine Ore

name: Nightforge Spike
description:
Weighted darts of forged adamantine. A skilled thrower can hurl them with surprising
force and accuracy.
dropLocation: A Relic of a Sovereign Past, Turn in 10 Adamantine Ore

name: Nightforge Stiletto
description: Assassins favor these slim blades for their light weight and incredible strength.
dropLocation: A Relic of a Sovereign Past, Turn in 8 Adamantine Ore

name: Nightmare, the Fallen Moon
description:
A moonblade is an elven artifact, passed down a family lineage from parent to
child. Only a worthy heir to their house is able to wield a moonblade. This
blade, however, has fallen far from its origin. Having been corrupted by dark
magic, Nightmare will serve anyone strong enough to claim it... for a time.
dropLocation: Caught in the Web, End Chest

name: Nightmother's Bastard Sword
description:
Forged in the Demiplane of Dread, this weapon has been hallowed in the name
of Mother Night. It holds ineffable power... and something else?
dropLocation: Blue Water Inn, Turn in 80 Vistani Totems

of Mother Night. It holds ineffable power... and something else?
dropLocation: Blue Water Inn, Turn in 80 Vistani Totems

name: Nightshade Shooter
description:
Fires bolts that have been prepared with an incredibly powerful poison. Handle
with care.
dropLocation: The Same Old Song, End chest

name: Nightshard
description: This large, curved sword is a scimitar.
dropLocation: Killing Time, end chest

name: Nocturne, the Song of Night
description:
Dark and cold are the nights in Barovia. But the harsh wind through the trees
makes a hollow tune, for those desperate enough to hear it.
dropLocation: The Curse of Strahd, Raid Warded Chest

name: Nova, the Wild Star
description: Unpredictable wild magics chase this star on its flight.
dropLocation: Threats Old and New, Raid Warded chest

name: Noxious Fang
description:
One of the dread spider Mandible's poisonous fangs was transformed into a throwing
knife. It deals poison damage and is enchanted to always return to the thrower.
dropLocation: The Snitch, Mandible 's chest (optional named spider)

name: Null, the Darkness Without
description:
Those who know themselves may change their hearts as easily as moving this blade
from one hand to the other.
dropLocation: The Curse of Strahd, Raid Warded Chest

name: Nuushmaar's Adamantine Tooth
description:
A long, thin sword with a fine point. Unlike other swords, this weapon lacks
an edged blade, and can only be used for thrusting attacks.
dropLocation: Stormcleave Outpost, Nuushmaar 's chest

name: Oath of Droaam
description:
The great axe was enchanted by the daughters of Sora Kell for the last champion
of Droaam .
dropLocation: Tharashk Arena, Special quest only temporary weapon

name: Oathblade
description:
This exquisite longsword is sharper than any blade you have seen before. Engraved
upon the blade are the cryptic words 'Hope rides alone.'
dropLocation: Eveningstar, Turn in 15 Commendations: Purple Dragon Knights Commendation: Purple Dragon Knights : This is a valuable item that can be exchanged for goods if brought to a Challenge Trader. This is a token of favor earned by helping the Purple Dragon Knights. You can exchange it in Eveningstar for powerful equipment.

name: Obsidian Dagger
description:
A weapon cut from volcanic glass, once used by elven necromancers once to cut
away the souls of the departed.
dropLocation: The Mystery of Delera's Tomb, End chest

name: Ogrish War Axe
description:
The ogres of Droaam dress themselves in heavy armor and wield huge metallic
weapons, unlike their more tribal cousins. This war axe is infused with the
fury of such well-armed ogre brutes.
dropLocation: Attack on Stormreach, End reward

name: Ol' Reliable
description:
This hefty wooden hammer is everything you need to repair and maintain a seaworthy
vessel.
dropLocation: The Curse and the Captive Crustacean, end chest

name: Oladren's Great Crossbow
description:
The elf Oladren eschewed the bow, preferring this beast of a crossbow instead.
The largest of the crossbows, it is weighty enough to require special training
to use.
dropLocation: The Collaborator, End reward

name: Omen, Herald of the Fall
description:
This blade was forged in hope, which quickly became desperation. Now, it calls
for the end of all who meet its edge,
dropLocation: Threats Old and New, Raid Warded chest

name: Onyxhorn
description: The horn of the minotaur of the same name.
dropLocation: Stormcleave Outpost, Onyxhorn 's Chest

name: Ornamented Dagger (legacy) (level 12)
description:

magic. Most likely it was seized from nobles by a band of pirates as part of
their pillaging.
dropLocation: Treasure of Crystal Cove, Turn in at Dusty Old Treasure of Crystal Cove

dropLocation: ToEE: Air Node, dragon's hoard chests, ToEE: Fire Node, Periron chest, ToEE: Water Node, Jotun Rimeblade chest, and ToEE: Earth Node, Hyrelgas chest

description: A weight more powerful than a body can bear, made manifest.
dropLocation: Fire Over Morgrave, end chest

name: Petrifying Shadow Staff
description:
This withered staff, said to be infused with the Shadow's arcane power, can
now cause its wielder's foes to turn solidly to stone.
dropLocation: Cauldron of Sora Katra, Upgrade of Staff of the Shadow + Stonedust Handwraps + Mark of Sheshka

name: Petrifying War Axe
description:

dropLocation: Partycrashers, Salva d'Phiarlan chest and bonus chests at end

name: Raellia, the Frostblade
description:
A razor-sharp column of stinging ice that sprang forth from your hands... Although
it's not quite clear what has conjured it. The ice responds to the willpower
and intuition of the wielder. As the Frost Blade is not physical, monks may
use it without becoming uncentered.
dropLocation: The Dryad and the Demigod, End chest and optional chest

name: Rahl's Might
description:
This versatile Monk weapon was the favored implement of a hill giant follower

dropLocation:
The Mindsunder, Disc locked optional end chest ; 
 Chance on every 3rd completion of The Mindsunder

description: A sceptre containing multiple charges of Heal Light Wounds.
dropLocation: DDO Store

name: Rod of Heal Moderate Wounds
description: A sceptre containing multiple charges of Heal Moderate Wounds.
dropLocation: DDO Store

name: Rod of Heal Serious Wounds
description: A sceptre containing multiple charges of Heal Serious Wounds.
dropLocation: DDO Store

name: Rod of Mythant
description:
This rod was taken from Mythant upon his imprisonment. It occasionally shakes
in its wielder's hands, a side effect of the arcane power pent up inside of
it.
dropLocation: Demon Assault, End chest

name: Rod of Teleport
description:
A sceptre containing multiple charges of Teleport . This spell can instantly
transport you to a variety of locations.
dropLocation: Anniversary Card Collection, Turn in Card III: Kuo-toa & Card IV: Mimic for 2; Fast Travel from the DDO Store; or as a Festival of the Traveler 2010 Special event common reward

name: Romag's Club of Earthen Dominion
description:
This short club belonging to Romag, curate of the Earth Temple, grants him dominion
over Earth Elementals. It would be a shame if it fell into the wrong hands.
dropLocation: Temple of Elemental Evil Part One, Romag's Chamber or Prison chest

name: Rope and Pulley
description:
An old sailor's creed, "A ship's only as good as its weakest link," applies
doubly so in a storm.
dropLocation: Whispers of Return, end chest

name: Royal Scimitar (historic)
description:
One of six swords passed down through the royal family of Aurelia. Its edge
is sharp enough to cut through even the toughest armor.
dropLocation: The Prison of the Planes, Shavarath room's chest

name: Royal Scimitar (Level 12)
description:
One of six swords passed down through the royal family of Aurelia. Its edge
is sharp enough to cut through even the toughest armor.
dropLocation: The Prison of the Planes, Shavarath room's chest (Heroic Normal)

name: Rumbling Thunder
description: This crossbow is... vibrating?
dropLocation: Security Detail, End chest

name: Runed Ogre Femur
description:
This club was made from the leg bone of an ogre mage. Runes are carved into
the sides.
dropLocation: Flesh Maker's Laboratory, End chest

name: Rusted Shamshir
description:
An elegant weapon with a curved, single-edged blade. The metal is marred by
small flecks of rust. Scraping them off only causes more to appear.
dropLocation: The Tear of Dhakaan, Champion Prantag 's Chest

name: Rusty Great Axe
description:
A big, heavy, double-bladed axe wieldable only with two hands. The axe head
is rusted with age. Double-click on this weapon to equip it.
dropLocation: Shipwreck Shore, Jeets Shimis

name: Rusty Heavy Mace
description:
This mace is rather heavy, but the head is rusted with age. Double-click on
this weapon to equip it.
dropLocation: Shipwreck Shore, Jeets Shimis

name: Rusty Longsword
description:
This long bladed slashing weapon is well used and is rusted with age. Double-click
on this weapon to equip it.
dropLocation: Shipwreck Shore, Jeets Shimis

name: Rusty Rapier
description:
A long, thin sword with a fine point. This sword is rusted with age. Double-click
on this weapon to equip it.
dropLocation: Shipwreck Shore, Jeets Shimis

name: Sacrificial Dagger
description: This vile blade was used by a drow priestess to sacrifice innocent farmers.
dropLocation:
Impossible Demands, End Chest ; 
 Menace of the Underdark: The Darkening, Quest chain end reward

name: Salazar, Borne of Hemlock
description:
This leaf is so sharp it can be thrown as if it were a shuriken. It carries
the essence of a deep, dark poison, that brings both sleep and death.
dropLocation: The Dryad and the Demigod, End chest and optional chest

name: Sanctity, the Morninglord's Keep
description:
It alone will judge you.

This blade becomes more powerful when used by those who are devoted to Law,
and its power increases even further when a paladin wields it.
dropLocation: The Curse of Strahd, Raid Chest

name: Sapphire Sting
dropLocation: ToEE: First Level and Earth Temple, end chest and ToEE: Air Node, dragon's hoard chests

name: Savage Sword
description:
Also known as a hand-and-a-half sword, and the largest of the single-handed
sword, this weapon requires special training to use.
dropLocation: Redwillow's Ruins, Savage Tooth 's Chest

name: Savaran's Tooth
description:
A fragment of the Blue Dragon's power that came into being when his soul was
torn from his body.
dropLocation: Thrall of Duty, end chest

name: Savior, the Breaker of Chains
description: This hammer shudders in the presence of chains, both in metal and mind.
dropLocation: Old Baba's Hut, Raid Chest

name: Scalegouger
description: This Heavy Pick is a quick and efficient way to pry scales from large fish.
dropLocation: Danger at Dunwater, End Chest

name: Scepter of Healing
description: This Flametouched iron scepter has been enchanted to focus healing powers
dropLocation: Invasion Tokens, Turn in 25 Outsider Tokens

name: Scepter of Mad Trickery
description:
Holding this scepter by its slippery grip, you hear voices cackling madly and
a chill runs down your spine. Suddenly your thoughts are filled with ways to
weave illusions that will drive your enemies to insanity.
dropLocation: Harbinger of Madness, End reward

name: Scepter of Siberys
description:
In honor of those who have performed in the highest standings, the Coin Lords
award the Scepter of Siberys, a symbol of high achievement in dedication to
the glory of Stormreach.
dropLocation: Special event items, Hide and Seek

name: Scepter of the Fleshweaver
description:
Said to be a creation of Mordain the Fleshweaver, master transmuter of Droaam,
this scepter boosts the wielder's intellect and improves his or her skill with
transmutation magic.
dropLocation: Frame Work, end chests, Dorris ' chests

name: Scepter of the Ogre Magi
description:
Lost to time, this scepter was eventually recovered by ogre magi and put to
use in combat. It improves the damage of one's spells and makes him or her
less likely to be interrupted while casting them.
dropLocation: Assault on Summerfield, end chest

name: Sceptre of Combustion
description: This magical sceptre is attuned to Fire spells.
dropLocation: Morten Edgewright, Turn in 1 Arcane Ingot

name: Sceptre of Corrosion
description: This magical sceptre is attuned to Acid spells.
dropLocation: Morten Edgewright, Turn in 1 Arcane Ingot

name: Sceptre of Devotion
description: This magical sceptre is attuned to Positive spells.
dropLocation: Morten Edgewright, Turn in 1 Arcane Ingot

name: Sceptre of Glaciation
description: This magical sceptre is attuned to Cold spells.
dropLocation: Morten Edgewright, Turn in 1 Arcane Ingot

name: Sceptre of Impulse
description: This magical sceptre is attuned to Force spells.
dropLocation: Morten Edgewright, Turn in 1 Arcane Ingot

name: Sceptre of Magnetism
description: This magical sceptre is attuned to Electric spells.
dropLocation: Morten Edgewright, Turn in 1 Arcane Ingot

name: Sceptre of Nullification
description: This magical sceptre is attuned to Negative Energy and Poison spells.
dropLocation: Morten Edgewright, Turn in 1 Arcane Ingot

name: Sceptre of Radiance
description: This magical sceptre is attuned to Light spells.
dropLocation: Morten Edgewright, Turn in 1 Arcane Ingot

name: Sceptre of Reconstruction
description: This magical sceptre is attuned to Repair spells.
dropLocation: Morten Edgewright, Turn in 1 Arcane Ingot

name: Sceptre of Resonation
description: This magical sceptre is attuned to Sonic spells.
dropLocation: Morten Edgewright, Turn in 1 Arcane Ingot

name: Scimitar of the Fallen Age
description: Wild magic has imbued entropy into this weapon over the years.
dropLocation: Magic of Myth Drannor, any end chest

name: Scimitar of the Golden Age
description: Forged in the glory of Cormanthor, this weapon is remarkably well-preserved.
dropLocation: Magic of Myth Drannor, rare drop in any end chest

name: Scimitar of the Undying Age
description: The ritual's power has imbued this weapon with an immortal fire and unholy purpose.
dropLocation:
Ritual Table, Turn in 
Legendary Scimitar of the Golden Age 
120 Barrier Fragments

name: Scorched Club
description: A weapon found deep within the Temple of Elemental Evil.
dropLocation: Temple of Elemental Evil Part One, and Temple of Elemental Evil Part Two any chest

name: Scorched Greataxe
description: A weapon found deep within the Temple of Elemental Evil.
dropLocation: Temple of Elemental Evil Part One, and Temple of Elemental Evil Part Two any chest

name: Scorched Greatsword
description: A weapon found deep within the Temple of Elemental Evil.
dropLocation: Temple of Elemental Evil Part One, and Temple of Elemental Evil Part Two any chest

name: Scorched Handwraps
description: Handwraps that were found deep within the Temple of Elemental Evil.
dropLocation: Temple of Elemental Evil Part One, and Temple of Elemental Evil Part Two any chest

name: Scorched Quarterstaff
description: A weapon found deep within the Temple of Elemental Evil.
dropLocation: Temple of Elemental Evil Part One, and Temple of Elemental Evil Part Two any chest

name: Scorching Wraps
description:
These cloth handwraps, favored by the minotaur brawler Scorchtusk, were enchanted
so that his blows will strike with the power of the flame. They're also 'enchanted'
with nails. Pointy-ends out.
dropLocation: Three-Barrel Cove (heroic), Scorchtusk 's Chest (Rare Encounter)

name: Scorpion Staff
description:
Intricate Carvings of insects and scorpions decorate the length of this staff.
When struck on the ground, it will summon a scorpion to fight for its wielder.
dropLocation: The Seal of Shan-To-Kor, End reward

name: Scorpion Tail Shortbow
description: A smaller wooden bow with a shorter firing distance.
dropLocation: Redwillow's Ruins, Ravenous ' Chest

name: Scoundrel's Cutlass
description:
A pirate classic. Great for a ship-to-ship boarding action. Plus, it makes you
look positively frightening when you wave it around at people.
dropLocation: Three-Barrel Cove (heroic), End reward

name: Scoundrel's Greatsword
description:
The largest of the swords, this weapon can only be used with two hands. Used
for when you just can't get enough murder and pillaging done with a smaller
weapon.
dropLocation: Three-Barrel Cove (heroic), End reward

name: Scoundrel's Longsword
description:
A classic straight-bladed sword usable in one hand. Commonly associated with
knighthood and valor. Except this one. This one was associated with pirates.
dropLocation: Three-Barrel Cove (heroic), End reward

name: Scoundrel's Repeating Heavy Crossbow
description:
A complex weapon consisting of a heavy crossbow and a clip for bolts that is
loaded by pulling the lever.
dropLocation: Three-Barrel Cove (heroic), End reward

name: Scraps of Enlightenment
description:
These thin shreds of fabric once covered the shoulders of a mighty Paladin who
ventured into the Battlefield. After he was burned alive, this is all that
remains of him.
dropLocation: The Archons' Trial, End chest

name: Screamshatter
description: Bolts fired from this weapon fire so fast it sounds like they're screaming.
dropLocation: Safety in Numbers, end chest

name: Selune's Favor
description: Favor follows those who choose to bear her light.
dropLocation: The Darkness and the Light, end chest (rare)

name: Serpentbranch
description:
A crude longbow fashioned from jungle vines, it exudes a sticky sap that adheres
well to the tips of arrows.
dropLocation: The Missing Party, End chest

name: Serrulae
description:
This simple looking axe is thousands of years old. Its history includes slaying
a giant commander during the elf uprising.
dropLocation: Tome of Untold Legends, Turn in completed Tome: Binding

name: Sever
description:
A ritualistic weapon of ancient barbaric dwarven tribes. This weapon was used
to ceremoniously behead caught goblin and orc chieftans.
dropLocation: Tome of Untold Legends, Turn in completed Tome: Binding

name: Shadow Star
description:
Magical Shurikens are a favorite weapon of Hobgoblin Assassins. They are incredibly
accurate and enchanted to return to whoever throws it.
dropLocation: The Seal of Shan-To-Kor, End reward

name: Shadow's Curve
description: An evil sickle, perfect for those shrouded in darkness.
dropLocation: Army of Eternal Night, end Chest

name: Shadowscythe
description:
This manifestation of Illusion Magic is made real by your touch... and something
else. As the Shadowscythe is not physical, monks may use it without becoming
uncentered.
dropLocation: Hunt or Be Hunted, end chest

name: Shadowstrike
description: This fine bow is eerily cool to the touch. Strange arcane sigils cover the exterior.
dropLocation: Kind of a Big Deal, End chest

name: Shamanic Staff
description:
Holding this staff, you feel the power of ancient and wild magic course through
your body.
dropLocation: Cult of the Six, End reward

name: Shatterbow
description:
Arrows fired from this bow are invested with powerful sonic energy, and are
shot so fast that they shriek through the air. Constructs hit by these arrows
are wounded grievously.
dropLocation: Altar of Vulkoor, Upgrade of Dampened Shatterbow

name: Sheridan's Ruin
description:
Sheridan was a highwayman of little consequence. His blades, on the other hand,
are of superb sharpness and balance. A shame he couldn't hold onto them.
dropLocation: Cult of the Six, End reward

name: Sheridan's Wrack
description:
Sheridan was a highwayman of little consequence. His blades, on the other hand,
are of superb sharpness and balance. A shame he couldn't hold onto them.
dropLocation: Cult of the Six, End reward

name: Shimmering
description:
The ultimate irony - a giant in life, bones bound in death' - Merith Strongbow,
knight of Myth Drannor
dropLocation: The Haunted Halls of Eveningstar, Acquired by taking it out of the Fallen Giant

name: Shining Crescents
description:
A complex staff-like weapon that is enchanted to allow almost anyone to use
it with some skill.
dropLocation: The Titan Awakes, Raid Warded Chest

name: Shining Devastation
description:
A huge club fashioned from adamantium and coated with a shining rust-resistant
material.
dropLocation: Litany of the Dead, All bosses' end chests

dropLocation:
Ritual Table, Turn in

120 Barrier Fragments

description: Wild magic has imbued entropy into this weapon over the years.
dropLocation: Magic of Myth Drannor, any end chest

name: Shortsword of the Golden Age
description: Forged in the glory of Cormanthor, this weapon is remarkably well-preserved.
dropLocation: Magic of Myth Drannor, rare drop in any end chest

description: The ritual's power has imbued this weapon with an immortal fire and unholy purpose.

name: Shrieking Star
description:
The resonant crystals of the Shrieking Mines have an extreme affinity with sonic
energy. A cunning ogre mage took advantage of this property, expertly fusing
tiny crystal shards with metal to craft this powerful crystalline weapon.
dropLocation: Slavers of the Shrieking Mines, Locked chest

name: Shuriken of the Fallen Age
description: Wild magic has imbued entropy into this weapon over the years.
dropLocation: Magic of Myth Drannor, any end chest

name: Shuriken of the Golden Age
description: Forged in the glory of Cormanthor, this weapon is remarkably well-preserved.
dropLocation: Magic of Myth Drannor, rare drop in any end chest

name: Shuriken of the Undying Age
description: The ritual's power has imbued this weapon with an immortal fire and unholy purpose.
dropLocation:
Ritual Table, Turn in 
Legendary Shuriken of the Golden Age 
120 Barrier Fragments

name: Sickle of Sypheros
description:
This grayish sickle with a bloodstained edge freezes the skin when touched.
While not evil in itself, its past has been long and troubled.
dropLocation: The Grey Moon's Den: Extermination, End Chest

name: Sickle of the Fallen Age
description: Wild magic has imbued entropy into this weapon over the years.
dropLocation: Magic of Myth Drannor, any end chest

dropLocation: Magic of Myth Drannor, rare drop in any end chest

dropLocation:
Ritual Table, Turn in 
Legendary Sickle of the Golden Age 
120 Barrier Fragments

name: Sickle of Vile Attunement
description: This evil implement is well suited to any Necromancer.
dropLocation: The Sacred Bounty, End chest

name: Silver Blade of the Flame
description: This Silver weapons seems to call to you...
dropLocation: Housekeeping, End chest

name: Silver Ingot Arcanum (historic)
description:
Once used as a wand by the giants of the Lost Empire, this five-foot rod makes
a heavy fighting staff for a human-sized wielder. It is inscribed with runes
that would fascinate and befuddle the greatest scholars of Xen'drik.
dropLocation: Gianthold Tor, Blue Dragon Chest

a heavy fighting staff for a human-sized wielder. It is inscribed with runes

name: Silver Longbow
description:
This longbow was enchanted for Church of the Silver Flame to give to warriors
that had distinguished themselves in combat against Evil. Arrows fired from
this bow seek the most vulnerable locations to strike.
dropLocation: The Church and the Cult, End Chest

name: Silver Slinger
description:
When Templars of the Silver Flame requested a powerful crossbow for use against
the undead, the Silver Slinger was the answer. It blunts the ammunition used
with it such that even skeletons will crumble beneath its assault.
dropLocation: Servants of the Overlord, Drow Ritual chest

name: Sinister Handaxe
description:
Something about this axe makes you uneasy. On the other hand, it fits so snugly
into your off-hand.
dropLocation: Ravens' Bane, end chest

name: Sireth, Spear of the Sky
description:
Said to have been wielded by an astral deva, this spear is capable of tearing
open the vault of heaven to bring the wrath of the skies down upon your enemies.
dropLocation: Caught in the Web, End Chest

name: Sirocco
description:
A desert spirit bound to this sword summons a tiny sandstorm around its target
on each hit. This sandstorm can blind and even knock down your opponent.
dropLocation: The Chamber of Raiyum, Treasure Room Chest

name: Skartongue's Ladel
description: This magical mace, a trophy of battle, is magically enhanced.
dropLocation: Irestone Inlet, Skartongue 's chest

name: Skeleton Hunter
description: This Maul seeks to crumble all bones laid before it.
dropLocation: Dread Sea Scrolls, end chest

name: Skin of the Mockery
description:
These handwraps appear to be made of flayed human flesh, and are inscribed with
blasphemous sigils associated with the Mockery, a god of the Dark Six.
dropLocation: Cult of the Six, End reward

name: Skiver
description:
With this dagger, an unknown assassin slew the first leader of The Twelve in
Stormreach. A pile of ash, thought to be his killer, was next to his body,
the full height of his power having been transferred to the blade.
dropLocation: Tome of Untold Legends, Turn in completed Tome: Binding

name: Skull Head
description: It's a skull. It's looking at you. It wants to be thrown. At your friends.
dropLocation: The Night Revels, Turn in 10 Piece of Darkest Chocolate to Joe Candymaker

name: Skullsmasher (historic)
description:
Judging from the bits of flesh and skull stuck to the top of this mace, Gorn
Gut-Chewer must have used it to settle many disputes.
dropLocation: The Crucible, Gorn Gut-Chewer's chest

name: Skullsmasher (Level 12)
description:
Judging from the bits of flesh and skull stuck to the top of this mace, Gorn
Gut-Chewer must have used it to settle many disputes.
dropLocation: The Crucible, Gorn Gut-Chewer 's chest (Heroic Normal)

name: Sky Pirate's Dagger
description:
Previously the prized possession of the Air Pirate Captain, Ilmarin Tychonn,
this dagger is perfectly balanced and of exquisite quality.
dropLocation: Three-Barrel Cove (heroic), Ilmarin Tychonn 's Chest (Rare Encounter)

name: Skybreaker, Hand of the Stormreaver
description: None
dropLocation: The Fall of Truth, Raid Warded chest (Epic Normal)

name: Slave Master's Staff
description:
This staff contains the power of Fire, the wrath of Electricity, and the corruption
of Acid.
dropLocation: Assault on the Aerie of the Slave Lords, End chest

name: Slaver's Hand Crossbow
description:
House Avithoul has perfected many a poison and alchemical concoction designed
to incapacitate a victim. This drow crossbow automatically coats the tip of
any bolt it fires in a potent mix of such venoms.

name: Slice
description: It slices.
dropLocation: Multitude of Menace, End chest

name: Smoldering Club
description: A weapon found deep within the Temple of Elemental Evil.
dropLocation: Temple of Elemental Evil Part One, and Temple of Elemental Evil Part Two any chest

name: Smoldering Cudgel
description:
This crude stick was once used as campfire kindling. It has retained some of
its fiery qualities. Wielding this will make you quite easy to spot.
dropLocation: Ghost of a Chance, Found in Fire Pit

name: Smoldering Greataxe
description: A weapon found deep within the Temple of Elemental Evil.
dropLocation: Temple of Elemental Evil Part One, and Temple of Elemental Evil Part Two any chest

name: Smoldering Greatsword
dropLocation: Temple of Elemental Evil Part One, and Temple of Elemental Evil Part Two any chest

name: Smoldering Handwraps
description: Handwraps that were found deep within the Temple of Elemental Evil.
dropLocation: Temple of Elemental Evil Part One, and Temple of Elemental Evil Part Two any chest

name: Smoldering Light Crossbow
dropLocation: Temple of Elemental Evil Part One, and Temple of Elemental Evil Part Two any chest

name: Smoldering Quarterstaff
description: A weapon found deep within the Temple of Elemental Evil.
dropLocation: Temple of Elemental Evil Part One, and Temple of Elemental Evil Part Two any chest

name: Snowball
description: A well packed snowball with perfect heft.
dropLocation: Risia Ice Games

name: Snowstar
description:
A perfectly formed icy crystal, razor-sharp and well-suited for throwing. Strange,
it doesn't seem to melt.
dropLocation: Cult of the Six, End reward

name: Soniar, the Echo of Pain
description:
When one holds this hammer in their hand, they can almost hear anguish through
planes and time.
dropLocation: Den of Vipers, end chest

name: Soren's Handwraps
description:
Strips of cloth meant to be wrapped around your hands. This strip of cloth has
been enchanted to slightly burn opponents with acid.
dropLocation: The Grotto, End reward

name: Soul's Sorrow
description: Chaos reigns within me.
dropLocation: Schism Shard Crafting, Turn in 5 Schism Shards and Legendary Wave of Despair

name: Souleater
description:
This is the staff used by the sahuagin High Priestess Slikir to commune with
and channel a demon. It took on many of the demon's aspects and is now a dangerous
and corrupted implement.
dropLocation: Into the Deep, Demon's chests

name: Soulrazor
description: I delight in your voracity.
dropLocation: Schism Shard Crafting, Turn in 5 Schism Shards, Legendary Echo of Blackrazor and Sentient Jewel of Blackrazor

name: Sparkstriker
description:
Forged from dwarven steel and meteoric iron, this pick shoots out a torrent
of sparks when it strikes a foe.
dropLocation: The Mystery of Delera's Tomb, End chest

name: Spear of the Hunter
description: The Master of the Hunt has graciously granted you this as a token of his respect.
dropLocation: Hunt or Be Hunted, end chest

name: Spear of the Mournlands
description: The one and only.
dropLocation: Legendary Lord of Blades, end chest

buffs.type: Favor of the Lord of Blades

name: Spearfisher
description:
This fishing spear makes for a fine weapon - or, in a pinch, a quick way to
secure some lunch.
dropLocation: Wild Thing, end chest

to dust formed these ethereal blades.
dropLocation: The Night Revels, Turn in various ingredients at Joe Candymaker

name: Spectre Striker
description:
A subtle mist surrounds this weapon. It is likely quite useful against certain
Undead foes that other weapons have a hard time connecting with.
dropLocation: Housekeeping, Either End chest

name: Sphere of Silver Flame Essence
description:
This sphere contains a minuscule portion of a guardian spirit of the silver
flame. Use it to smite your foes and claim your ground.
dropLocation: The Spinner of Shadows, The Silver Flame

name: Spider Spike
description:
This is actually a full fledged Hobgoblin war sword that has been sharpened
down over the years to the point where its primary function is sticking spiders
and other giant bugs that intrude on Hobgoblin territory.
dropLocation: The Seal of Shan-To-Kor, End reward

name: Spiked Mace of the Elements
description:
A large Morningstar used to when carving out the Hobgoblin caves to smash Earth
Elementals into bits and pieces.
dropLocation: The Seal of Shan-To-Kor, End reward

name: Spinal Tap
dropLocation: ToEE: Air Node, dragon's hoard chests (Confirmed), ToEE: Fire Node, Periron chest, ToEE: Water Node, Jotun Rimeblade chest, and ToEE: Earth Node, Hyrelgas chest

name: Spiral, the Voice of the Elements
description:
This sceptre unlocks the pinnacle of arcane power within you, an endless joyful
cacaphony of light and color.
dropLocation: The Curse of Strahd, Raid Warded Chest
_file: Spiral, the Voice of the Elements.item

name: Spite, the Fractured Shards
description: A glass that seeks the heart.
dropLocation: Old Baba's Hut, Raid Chest

name: Splintermast
description: This broken shard of a wrecked ship seeks out enemies to take its revenge.
dropLocation: Under the Cover of Darkness, end chest

name: Spur, the Claw of Death
description: Death and fire flow from his mighty jaws.
dropLocation: Threats Old and New, Raid Warded chest

name: Squid Smasher
description:
This appears to be hand carved! Whoever this craftsman was, he must have been
incredibly talented.
dropLocation: Treasure of Crystal Cove, Turn in 100 Silver Doubloon 50 Golden Doubloon 15 Stolen Pyrite 300 Green Dragonshard at Euphonia's Barter Box

name: Staff of Arcane Power
description:
This staff began as a ceremonial weapon created by the gnolls of the desert.
Long years of use by powerful shaman have gradually increased the staff's power.
This process has accelerated lately as the staff has been involved in powerful
summoning ritual.
dropLocation: Zawabi's Revenge, Raid Warded chest

name: Staff of Fleshshaping
description:
A staff apparently carved and whittled down from an unknown creature's bone.
You get the sense it was used for fell purposes, but turned towards better
ends it might aid you in the arts of healing.
dropLocation: Sinister Storage, End chest

name: Staff of Inner Sight
description:
This staff is made from a slender willow branch. As you hold it, you feel the
weight and knowledge of many centuries wash over your senses.
dropLocation: Chains of Flame, Library Chest

name: Staff of Irian
description:
A simple weapon that comprised of a long handle, but in capable hands it can
be so much more.
dropLocation: Killing Time, end chest

buffs.type: Power of the Flames of Purity

name: Staff of Nat Gann
description:
This weapon belonged to the famed performer Nat Gann. Though he remains lost
to time, his staff lives on in his memory, and is an ideal tool for the aspiring
acrobat.
dropLocation: The Chronoscope, End reward

name: Staff of the Golden Wizard
description:
This staff was taken from the body of the famed pyromancer of the old times,
the Golden Wizard.
dropLocation: The Shroud, available at start of the first phase

name: Staff of the Necromancer
description:
Made from a solid rod of dark metal, this staff is deceptively light. Strange,
arcane script traces like spiderwebs across its surface.
dropLocation: The House of Death Undone, End Chest ; Menace of the Underdark: City of Portals, Quest chain end reward

name: Staff of the Petitioner
description: The favored implement of the Black Abbot.
dropLocation: Ascension Chamber, Raid Warded chest

name: Staff of the Shadow
description:
The Shadow, worshipped throughout Droaam for his inclination towards destruction,
is said to have invested this withered staff with some of his arcane power.
dropLocation: Attack on Stormreach, End reward

name: Staff of the Summer Solstice
description:
This light beam of a sturdy oak is infused with righteous fury. The fireflies
that flicker around it seem delighted to see you.
dropLocation: The Dryad and the Demigod, End chest and optional chest

buffs.type: Power of the Flames of Purity

name: Staff of the Winter Solstice
description:
FEYTWISTED form of Staff of the Summer Solstice 

This light beam of a cursed oak is infused with cold magic. The faerielights
that flicker around it seem hostile.
dropLocation: The Dryad and the Demigod, Greater feytwisted chest

name: Star of Day
description:
Though seemingly made of pure gold, the blade of this bastard sword is as hard
as steel. It is also surprisingly light, able to be wielded effectively by
anyone who is proficient in the use of short swords. The clergy of the sun
god, Amaunator, have brought a number of these powerful relics to Eveningstar
in order to help combat the Darkening. Rumor and hushed whispers tell of three
blades among the Stars of Day that stand out from their bretheren, feared by
all that hide in shadow and darkness. This blade is not one of them.
dropLocation: Eveningstar, Turn in 15 Commendations: Clerics of the Amaunator Commendation: Clerics of Amaunator : This is a valuable item that can be exchanged for goods if brought to a Challenge Trader. This is a token of favor earned by helping the Clerics of Amaunator. You can exchange it in Eveningstar for powerful equipment.

name: Star of Endless Night (level 12)
description: This Morningstar holds an aspect of the Endless Night deep within it.
dropLocation: The Night Revels, Turn in various ingredients at Joe Candymaker

dropLocation: The Night Revels, Turn in various ingredients at Joe Candymaker
