name: Star of Irian
description: A simple weapon comprised of a round, spiked head and a long haft.
dropLocation: Tempest's Spine, Beholder chest

name: Starter Module
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .

name: Statica, the Concentrated Charge
description:
Touching the handle of this crossbow grants a shock, but then you become part
of its great current.
dropLocation: Den of Vipers, end chest

name: Stave of the Seer
description:
Ur-Keshik the Seer was known to be a powerful Mystic under Ghola-Fan's reign.
Whether his power was truly his own or merely derived from this staff remains
unknown.
dropLocation: Bring Me the Head of Ghola-Fan!, Ur-Keshik the Seer 's chest

name: Stickerclick, the Bitter Hail of Bolts
description:
This mechanical crossbow was once held by Irk, the conniving Goblin mercenery.
It has a modified firing mechanism that will let you fire additional bolts
at incredible speeds, and the cruel barbs can cause incredible trauma. Front
towards enemy.
dropLocation: Project Nemesis, End chest
_file: Stickerclick, the Bitter Hail of Bolts.item

name: Sting
description:
A gigantic scorpion stinger has been filed down and enchanted to form the blade
of this short sword.
dropLocation:
Sands of Menechtarun, Drow Area - Utach Sandcrawl 's chest ; 
 Masei Mkembe sells for 625 Antique Bronze Tokens

name: Stonedust Handwraps
description:
These strips of cloth seem to be always covered in dust and fine bits of rock.
When striking enemies they will occasionally stun them or turn them to stone,
and when wielded by a Monk in Earth Stance they will sometimes protect the
wearer with stone as well.
dropLocation: Eyes of Stone, End chest

name: Stonework Beam
description:
Though it retains all the toughness expected from Dwarwen stonework, this beam
is surprisingly sprightly.
dropLocation: Graveyard Shift, End chest

name: Stoneworker's Hammer
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Storm's Harness
dropLocation: Legendary Tempest's Spine, Raid chest

name: Storm
description:
This gnoll-built weapon is crude but carries an aura of magic. Its bolts fly
through the air with great power and accuracy.
dropLocation: Zawabi's Revenge, Raid Warded chest

name: Stormreach Guardian's Axe
description:
Left behind by a fallen member of the Stormreach Harbor Guard, this axe's work
is not yet finished.
dropLocation: Night Falls on Stormreach, End Chest

name: Stormreach Guardian's Crossbow
description:
Left behind by a fallen member of the Stormreach Harbor Guard, this crossbow's
aim is still true.
dropLocation: Night Falls on Stormreach, End chest

name: Stormreach Guardian's Hammer
description:
Left behind by a fallen member of the Stormreach Harbor Guard, this hammer still
has strikes left in it.
dropLocation: Quarantine, End Chest

name: Stout Oak Walking Stick
description:
This branch of solid oak, found in the King's Forest, feels almost as if it
was shaped just for your hands. Despite having never been touched by the blade
of a knife, it is perfectly smooth. Something within the wood almost seems
to pulse in sync with the beat of your heart.
dropLocation: Eveningstar, Turn in 15 Commendations: Villagers of Eveningstar Commendation: Villagers of Eveningstar : This is a valuable item that can be exchanged for goods if brought to a Challenge Trader. This is a token of favor earned by helping the Villagers of Eveningstar. You can exchange it in Eveningstar for powerful equipment.

name: Suffering, the Half of Whole
description: Pull your enemies out of their own minds.
dropLocation: Old Baba's Hut, Raid chest

name: Sun Blade
description:
This golden bastard sword is as light and easy to use as a shortsword. Its purpose
is to destroy all evil creatures and the undead.
dropLocation: The Subterrane - Central, Garamol 's chest

name: Sun Flask
description:
This flask is packed with secret ingredients passed down from generation to
generation of Festivult Jesters and bursts on impacting a monster or wall.
Nearby creatures are momentarily blinded by the flash, and it's claimed that
the liberal use of flash bangs drives away the darkness of Mabar.
dropLocation:
Festivult, Three Copper Festival Coins will give you a chance at getting a stack of 20DDO Store, Ammo 
Daily Dice

name: Suncrusher
description: "The sun itself will strike you down!"
dropLocation: Smash and Burn, end chest

name: Sunken Blasphemy
description:
Commissioned as thanks for a daring rescue by a prodigal monk, these matching
blades were lost at sea decades ago. The inscription on the blade reads 'a
small repayment' in flowing Elven script. Whoever this 'Arkat' was, he must
have done something very heroic.
dropLocation: Lost at Sea, Gift of the Devourer optional chest

name: Sunslice
description: Half of the sky.
dropLocation: No Refunds, End chest

name: Sunsword
description: This blade of light cries out to destroy Strahd.
dropLocation: The Curse of Strahd, Turn in given by Rudolph van Richten

name: Sureshot
description: Shoot first, ask questions later
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Swailing Blade (Level 15)

dropLocation: The Druid's Curse, End chest (Heroic Normal)

name: Swift Demise
description:
A ranged weapon consisting of a small bow mounted crosswise on a heavy wooden
stock. This weapon is large enough to require a winch for reloading, yet is
surprisingly simple to use.
dropLocation: Gwylan's Stand, Maneater 's chest

name: Sword Fish
description: This sword seems pretty fishy... or does this fish seemy swordy?
dropLocation: Too Many Cooks, end chest

name: Sword of Pain
description: A finely made shortsword glistening with a corrosive liquid.
dropLocation: Retrieve the Stolen Goods, Hurleb 's Chest

name: Sword of Shadow
description:
This great sword was forged inside the Vault of Night itself. The essence of
Shadow has seeped into this sword granting it exceptional death-dealing abilities.
dropLocation: Plane of Night, Raid Warded Chest

name: Sword of the Giant Slave-master
description:
This sword, smallish for a giant, was once used by a giant-slave master against
the rebelling elves.
dropLocation: Halls of Shan-To-Kor, Random Chest

name: Sword of the Thirty
description:
A simple but very effective two-handed sword that bears no maker's mark and
little decoration. This is a blade designed for war, not for trophy halls.
dropLocation: The Tear of Dhakaan, Champion Guptrak chest

This rapier adeptly subverts enemy defenses using the jolts of electricity infused

description:
This shortsword is viciously serrated, increasing the likelyhood of dealing
critical damage to an enemy. The blade is coated with a potent toxin, inflaming
any wounds inflicted by this weapon.
dropLocation: Three-Barrel Cove (heroic), Ithun Orenah 's chest (Rare Encounter)

name: Timeblade
description:
A sword gifted with the power to bend time. Powerful blows against your enemies
will slow their actions, and if you are falling and in danger it will slow
your descent so that you land safely.
dropLocation: The Chronoscope, End reward

name: Timeshard
description:
A sword gifted with the power to bend time. Powerful blows against your enemies
will slow their actions.
dropLocation: Killing Time, end chest

name: Tinah, Sword of the Sea
description:
Once wielded by the Legendary sailor, Paeyn the Bold, this blade was the scourge
of dragons for miles around the Sea of Fallen Stars. How it came to be here
is a mystery.
dropLocation: Caught in the Web, End Chest

name: Tinder
description:
This long staff is imbued with the burning power of the desert sun. Fire spells
cast using this staff to focus them are much more powerful.
dropLocation:
Sands of Menechtarun, Firebrand Area: Haraja the Firedancer 's Chest (Rare Encounter) ; 
 Masei Mkembe sells for 625 Antique Bronze Tokens

name: Toothpick
description:
A long, thin, slightly rusted sword with a fine point. It appears to be encrusted

name: Torn, That Which Renders Despair
description: Tear them apart.
dropLocation: Old Baba's Hut, Raid Chest

name: Tornado
description:
This simple handaxe is surprising sturdy and extremely light. Those that seek
to master it should flow with the wind rather than fight against it.
dropLocation: Killing Time, end chest

description:
This livewood bow has been charred, scarred and blackened by acid and fire.
Yet the bow still draws true, the wood somehow enduring in timeless agony.

name: Treason
description:
This weapon was a trophy of the giants' last victory, taken from the fallen
captain of the rebel elves. When the dragons intervened and obliterated the
Lost Empire, Treason was lost in the ashes.
dropLocation: The Reaver's Fate, Raid Warded chest

name: Tremor, the Breaker of Bones
description: Drag them down into the depths, where no light can reach them.
dropLocation: Old Baba's Hut, Raid Chest

name: Turbulent Epee
description:
A rapier, once well-kept by its original Elven owner, which has become twisted
and warped by the plane of Madness. Xoriat has granted this sword the ability
to unleash the elements upon its foes, but it never seems to settle on one
type...
dropLocation: Missing, Swiftfoot HQ chest

name: Twig of the Giant Mage
description:
A long, stout staff used as a simple weapon. Often favored by wizards or common
folk.
dropLocation: Redwillow's Ruins, End chest

name: Twilight, Element of Magic
description: A spark of magic for a studious mind.
dropLocation: Caught in the Web, Any end chest

name: Twinblade
description:
After a vicious battle in the Torlaac Moor, a swordsmith collected the blades
of the two fallen leaders and joined them together in this weapon.
dropLocation: Tome of Untold Legends, Turn in completed Tome: Binding

name: Twinchopper
description: A greataxe worthy of your good name.
dropLocation: Trials of the Triceratops, end chest

name: Twisted Missile
description: This twisted bit of shrapnel is deadly in the right hands.
dropLocation: Soul Survivor, end chest

name: Twisted Willow
description: This powerful longbow is fashioned from a beam from an enchanted Willow tree.
dropLocation: Just Business, End chest

name: Tyrzza's Bane
description:
A rapier infused with Tyrzza's essence and blessed by the Sovereign Host, this
sword will prove to be a powerful weapon against the demons.
dropLocation: Invaders!, End chest (only if Tyrzza is the end boss)

name: Unkor's Cleaver
description: The blade on this enormous meat cleaver is pitted and scarred by use.
dropLocation: Chains of Flame, Treasury chest

name: Unstable Handwraps
description:
Once brimming with only the power of lawfulness, these handwraps have become
slowly twisted by Xoriat. Yet they have not yet shed their original nature,
leaving them in a state of confusing double-alignment that has a disorienting
affect on the wearer's mind.
dropLocation: Reign of Madness, End reward

name: Untold, Crack in the Sky
description: The white feather drifts to the quiet sea below.
dropLocation: Too Hot to Handle, End chest

name: Unwavering Ardency
description:
This ashwood bow belonged to Kai-Teng Fairuza . The string is made of hairs
from a Nightmare.
dropLocation: Ascension Chamber, Raid Warded chest

name: Valen's Mace
description:
This mace once belonged to Valen, a cleric of the Silver Flame. It is said to
be quite potent against the Sahuagin.
dropLocation: The Collaborator, End reward

name: Valorius, the Flameblade
description:
A blazing beam of red hot fire that sprang forth from your hands... Although
it's not quite clear what has conjured it. The flames respond to the willpower
and intuition of the wielder. As the Flame Blade is not physical, monks may
use it without becoming uncentered.
dropLocation: The Dryad and the Demigod, End chest and optional chest

name: Vampiric Cleaver
description:
This falchion, infused with the power to draw a living enemy's blood, can now
draw life from its wielder's foes.
dropLocation: Cauldron of Sora Katra, Bloody Cleaver + Staff of the Shadow + Mark of Bal Molesh

name: Vampiric Fury Blade
description:
This large sword, capable of conferring a disease to enemies, can now draw life
from its wielder's foes.
dropLocation: Cauldron of Sora Katra, Blade of Fury + Staff of the Shadow + Mark of Sheshka .

name: Vampiric Fury Shortsword
description:
This small sword, capable of conferring a disease to enemies, can now draw life
from its wielder's foes.
dropLocation: Cauldron of Sora Katra, Upgraded version of Blade of Fury and Staff of the Shadow

description:
This pick, said to be infused with the Shadow's arcane power, can now draw life

dropLocation: Cauldron of Sora Katra, Rocksplitter + Staff of the Shadow + Mark of Rhesh Turakbar

name: Vampiric Stonedust Wraps

Ritual Table, Turn in

description: The chains of death are falling away, but the heart still bleeds.

name: Watcher's Blade
description:
An elegant but unsettling sword infused with the power of Belashyrra, the daelkyr

holding it. Nevertheless, it shares its awareness with you and is thus a good
ward against danger.
dropLocation: Acute Delirium, End chest

name: Wave of Despair
description:
The edges of this bastard sword glow with a sinister purple light. Graz'zt's

his own.
dropLocation: Desire in the Dark, End chest

name: Wave of Sorrow
description:
Transformed by Graz'zt 's influence, this once mundane blade now resembles his
greatsword. The longer you stare at it, the brighter the edges seem to glow.
dropLocation: Desire in the Dark, End chest

This scepter is a trophy of renown in the halls of Wayfinder Foundation. Those

dropLocation: Special event items, Item Finding Reward

dropLocation: The Captives, Guldag 's chest

An air spirit bound to this greatsword shrieks when the sword is swept through

dropLocation:
Sands of Menechtarun, Windlasher Area: Den Mother Fheena 's Chest (Rare Encounter) ;

name: Widowblight
description:
Kar'Thul ogres forged this wicked blade using a process which involved tempering

unfinished, which suggests it may have been a prototype. Nonetheless, this
weapon is very deadly
dropLocation: The Spawn of Whisperdoom, Turn in Splinterskull Historical Documents to the Ungurz Lieutenant for a small chance to get it
